messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0084",
  "title": "韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 26,
  "page_range": "26"
}

Section text:
## 韩国移动游戏收入TOP榜

message.content: This section serves as a heading for a ranked list or chart detailing the top-grossing mobile games in South Korea. It is structured to answer retrieval questions regarding market topics (South Korean mobile game revenue performance), entities (specific mobile game titles and the South Korean market), and metrics (revenue figures and ranking order). The title indicates the presence of a table or figure as the primary evidence type. Specific dates, definitions, procedures, analytical claims, and numerical data are not provided in the text itself and would be located within the associated visual or tabular content on page 26.
